title: install: make commands copy-pasteable
body:
Based on Elan Ruusamäe patch.
Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
I think this is one of these "PoTAYto" vs "PoTAHto" arguments.  I fall on the other side of the fence for this change.  Regardless:
LGTM
The problem, is that we are split on both sides of the fence, and that is not a comfortable place to be.

Yay 🎉 for the merge!

I hope it takes so much effort and confirmation when the next round decides to do the exact opposite!

ps: @rhatdan you can preserve authorship with `git commit --author "$email" [--amend]`, or `git cherry-pick $commit`
@glensc Hopefully you are right.  We have many more eyes on Podman, but need to focus on all containers repos.
